overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic action-adventure game featuring a female warrior with braided hair and tribal attire following a male companion through a rugged highland landscape. The sequence progresses from walking across open rocky terrain to scrambling up a cliff face and continuing across a grassy plateau under heavy overcast skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky highland path with scattered boulders

agents.ego_description: following the male companion through uneven rocky terrain with scattered grass patches

notable_agents.action: male companion walking ahead along the path, leading the way through the rocks

entered.detail: scattered large boulders and rocky outcrops covering the ground
hazy mountain range visible on the horizon under overcast skies
distinctive tall pointed rock formation rising above the landscape

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a female warrior walking through a wide-open rocky highland landscape. She follows a male companion who walks ahead along a gravel path scattered with large boulders. The sky is fully visible and overcast, with distant mountains and a prominent rock spire visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: steep cliff face with handholds and ledges

events.description: character transitions from walking to climbing, grasping onto rock face
character pulls herself up onto the summit ledge, completing the climb

agents.ego_description: scrambling up the cliff face using handholds and footholds, navigating vertical rock surfaces

notable_agents.action: male companion standing on the summit ledge waiting for the ego character to finish climbing

entered.detail: vertical rock wall with rough texture and climbing handholds
protruding rock shelves used as footholds during the ascent

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a steep cliff and begins climbing upward, transitioning from open walking to enclosed vertical navigation. The camera follows closely as she grips the rough rock face, using ledges and handholds to ascend. The male companion waits at the top, visible against the overcast sky as she nears the summit.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy plateau with distant rock formations

agents.ego_description: walking across the grassy plateau, catching up to the male companion who continues ahead

notable_agents.action: male companion walking ahead across the grass, leading toward distant rock formations

entered.detail: open flat area covered with green grass and scattered small rocks
distant rock formations and boulders dotting the landscape ahead

segments.scene_description: Having reached the summit, the character emerges onto a wide grassy plateau with full sky visibility restored. She continues following the male companion across the open grassland, with distant rock outcrops visible on the horizon. The terrain is now relatively flat compared to the previous climbing sequence.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rugged highland landscape that transitions from an open rocky valley to a vertical climb and finally onto a high grassy plateau. It begins by following a female warrior and her male companion as they traverse a wide, gravelly path scattered with boulders under a heavy overcast sky. As they reach a steep cliff, the perspective shifts from open walking to an enclosed vertical ascent, tracking the warrior closely as she grips the rough rock face to climb toward the summit. The scene then opens up once more as she reaches the top, emerging from the cliffside into a vast, flat expanse of grassland. Finally, the camera follows the pair as they continue their journey across the plateau toward distant rock outcrops on the horizon.
